seo.title: UI/UX Designer Resume Examples & Portfolio Guide 2026
seo.description: Write a perfect UX Designer resume in 2026. Includes Figma skills, portfolio tips, and a complete product designer resume example that passes ATS.
seo.keywords: UX designer resume, UI designer resume, figma designer resume, product designer portfolio, UX researcher resume 2026
seo.ogDescription: Build a design portfolio and resume that lands interviews at Airbnb, Figma, and top product companies.

hero.title: UI/UX Designer Resume Examples
hero.description: Your design portfolio speaks louder than your resume — but your resume still needs to get you past the ATS and onto the hiring manager's desk. Here's exactly how to do it.

mistakes: Submitting a resume without a portfolio link — no design portfolio = instant rejection.
Using a flashy, complex resume layout with columns and icons — this breaks ATS parsing. Keep it simple and text-based.
Listing Photoshop as a primary tool in 2026 — the industry has moved to Figma. List Figma prominently.
tips: Your portfolio URL must be at the very top of your resume — this is the most important element.
Quantify design impact: 'Redesigned checkout flow, reducing cart abandonment by 18%'.
Include your Figma proficiency level and list the types of projects you've designed (SaaS dashboards, mobile apps, design systems).

exampleResume.name: Ana Rodriguez
exampleResume.title: Senior Product Designer
exampleResume.summary: Senior Product Designer with 6+ years creating intuitive, data-driven user experiences for SaaS and consumer apps. Led a checkout redesign that reduced abandonment by 24% and drove $3.2M additional annual revenue. Strong in UX research, design systems, and cross-functional collaboration.

bullets: Led end-to-end redesign of checkout flow (Figma, Maze user testing), reducing cart abandonment by 24% and contributing $3.2M in additional ARR.
Built and maintained a 120-component Figma design system adopted by 8 engineering teams, reducing design-to-development time by 35%.
Conducted 60+ user interviews and 12 usability tests, informing a product roadmap that increased feature adoption by 41%.
Designed mobile apps and web platforms for 25+ clients in healthcare, FinTech, and e-commerce.
Created accessible designs (WCAG AA compliant) for a government platform serving 500k users.

exampleResume.skills: Figma, Prototyping, User Research, Usability Testing, Design Systems, Interaction Design, Accessibility (WCAG 2.2), Maze, Hotjar, Lottie Animations, Miro | Certifications: Google UX Design Certificate, NN/g UX Certificate
